title: Edit PDF - Free Offline PDF Editor
h1: Edit PDF Documents Directly in Your Browser
description: Add text, signatures, and annotations to your PDF files locally. No uploads, maximum privacy. 100% secure local processing.

sections.title: Why Edit PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Uploading sensitive contracts and forms to a cloud editor is a massive privacy risk. Our WebAssembly editor runs directly on your device, ensuring your documents never leave your computer.

steps.title: Open Document
steps.description: Select the PDF file you want to annotate or sign.

steps.title: Add Text & Elements
steps.description: Use our intuitive tools to add text, draw, or place images.

steps.title: Save Changes
steps.description: Export the modified PDF instantly without waiting for downloads.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Zero Data Transmission
sections.content: Unlike traditional PDF editors that upload your files to their servers, our platform processes everything in your browser memory.

sections.title: Instant Offline Rendering
sections.content: Our editor loads huge PDF files in milliseconds. You can add hundreds of annotations without any lag or network delay.

faqs.q: Can I edit existing text in the PDF?
faqs.a: Currently, you can add new text, shapes, and images over the existing document.
No, all editing happens locally within your browser using WebAssembly.
Yes, you can draw your signature or upload an image of it.

faqs.q: Is the editor free to use?
faqs.a: Yes, it is 100% free with no premium paywalls or hidden fees.

faqs.q: Does it work on mobile devices?
faqs.a: Yes, the editor is fully responsive and supports touch input for drawing.
